name: Ansible
description: Installs Ansible (and optionally ansible-lint) via uv tool, with pipx fallback. Auto-bootstraps Python + uv if no Python install is present.

version.description: Ansible version (passed as `ansible@<version>` to uv/pipx). 'latest' tracks PyPI.

extraCollections.description: Space-separated Ansible Galaxy collections to install (e.g. 'community.general ansible.posix'). Empty to skip.
